fields.label: Lease
fields.description: Lease that this rent schedule row belongs to.

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Short label for the charge period or billing line.

fields.label: Period From
fields.description: Start date of the rent period being billed.

fields.label: Period To
fields.description: End date of the rent period being billed.

fields.label: Due Date
fields.description: Date the payment is due for this schedule line.

fields.label: Currency
fields.description: Currency used for the rent schedule amounts.

fields.label: Base Rent
fields.description: Primary rent amount due for the period.

fields.label: Service Charge
fields.description: Service or maintenance charge due for the period.

fields.label: Tax
fields.description: Tax amount included in the scheduled payment.

fields.label: Total Due
fields.description: Calculated total of base rent, service charge, and tax.

fields.label: Payment Status
fields.options:
Not Paid
Partially Paid
Paid
Waived
fields.description: Actual payment status derived from recorded payments, or Waived when documented in Notes.

fields.label: Schedule Status
fields.options:
Planned
Due
Partially Paid
Paid
Waived
Overdue
Cancelled
fields.description: Operational status of the rent schedule entry.

fields.label: Total Paid
fields.description: Sum of all recorded payment entries.

fields.label: Outstanding Balance
fields.description: Remaining balance calculated from Total Due less Total Paid.

fields.label: Payment Reconciliation Required
fields.description: Flags a legacy partially paid schedule whose historical paid amount must be entered.

fields.label: Payment History
fields.description: Payments recorded against this scheduled obligation.

fields.label: Latest Payment Reference
fields.description: Reference from the latest payment entry, retained for compatibility and reporting.

fields.label: Latest Paid On
fields.description: Date of the latest payment entry.

fields.label: Notes
fields.description: Extra context about the charge, payment, or exceptions.
